discoveryBoundary: The amendment was designed after all 360 frozen model calls completed but before any formal aggregate, result row, or Lean batch-verification result existed. Monitoring inspected only call counts, transport-error counts, and latency, not task outcomes.

executionChange.algorithmicIsolation: one fresh child process per task and method

frozenUnchanged: independent Python oracle and final Lean verification

originalFailureReceipt.reasonStopped: The preregistered runner classified the 60-second wall-clock budget only after a method returned. After 120.2 minutes total wall time, including approximately 100 minutes in algorithmic scoring, it had not reached Lean batch verification.

scope: execution enforcement and crash recovery only; no task, prompt, response, method, budget, or success-definition change
